title: 9 Tinctures to Help Older Adults with Joint Stiffness
description: Urtica dioica tinctures, also known as nettle leaf tincture, may help with joint stiffness due to its anti-inflammatory properties and rich content of antioxidants and vitamins. The tincture is made from the leaves of the stinging nettle plant, which contain compounds like flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids. These constituents work together to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote healing in the joints. To try Urtica dioica tinctures for joint stiffness, take 20-30 drops of the ...
